rationale: The candidate 78734fe52a3af7c057b252263aec6fefad9102b2 is the best choice. It maintains the technical accuracy of the security concepts (infostealers, canary tokens, prompt injection) while adopting a direct, professional tone that matches the source. It correctly handles MDX structure, including the complex table and code blocks. Compared to the 'current' version, it is more concise and avoids some of the slightly awkward phrasing found in the pre-existing translation. It also correctly preserves the frontmatter and heading structure.
